content.rendered:
Live In Beaver Dam

Our Community

Nestled conveniently between Madison, Milwaukee, and the Green Bay/Fox Valley area, Beaver Dam, WI, offers a thriving community filled with abundant shopping, dining, and entertainment options with a small-town feel. Whether you’re looking for family-friendly activities or exciting nightlife, Beaver Dam has something for everyone.

Endless Entertainment and Activities
Beaver Dam boasts a flourishing theater, music, and arts scene, with festivals and events happening year-round. Enjoy local performances, art exhibits, and community celebrations that bring people together and create unforgettable experiences.

Outdoor Recreation and Natural Beauty
Stay active and enjoy the great outdoors with Beaver Dam’s beautiful golf course, serene lake, and numerous parks. From boating and fishing to hiking and picnicking, outdoor enthusiasts will find plenty of ways to explore and unwind. With the Horicon Marsh and wild Goose trail just a few miles away, you will never run out of places to explore.

Why Choose Beaver Dam?
-Convenient Location:Easy access to major cities like Madison, Milwaukee, and Green Bay/Fox Valley.

Thriving Community:A welcoming atmosphere with a strong sense of community and local pride.

Quality Lifestyle: A perfect blend of cultural activities, outdoor recreation, and modern amenities. Plus, Beaver Dam has excellent schools and access to quality healthcare.

Life is good in Beaver Dam – come see for yourself! Experience the charm, convenience, and vibrant lifestyle that await you in our wonderful city.

Make the Move to Beaver Dam, WI
Explore what makes Beaver Dam an ideal place to live, work, and play. Discover your new home today!

Life here is good in Beaver Dam – come see for yourself!

Testimonials

We didn’t just find a new hometown; we found a community.

Bob and Pat Coe

  • Beaver Dam Citizen

We have great relationships with our neighbors, our health care providers, and the do-ers in this community who work tirelessly to promote growth and progress. Our 5 kids go to 5 different schools in Beaver Dam and each one is just right for their unique gifts, talents, and needs. We are so happy in Beaver Dam!

Ben and Emily Shier

  • Beaver Dam Citizen

Everything we need on a regular basis for shopping is right here in town, but Madison, Milwaukee, and the Fox Valley are all nearby for anything else.

Micah and Scott Topel

  • Beaver Dam Citizen

I feel extremely fortunate to have been given the opportunity to make Beaver Dam my home. We have quickly fallen in love with the Beaver Dam community.

Fire Chief Michael Wesle

  • Beaver Dam Citizen, Fire Chief

Make Yourself At Home

 

Discover the Perfect Place to Call Home in Beaver Dam, Wisconsin

Are you searching for a community-focused city where you can truly put down roots? Look no further than Beaver Dam! With a welcoming small-town feel and all the amenities of a growing city, Beaver Dam offers a variety of housing options to suit every lifestyle. Whether you’re looking for a brand-new condominium, a spacious apartment for rent, or a charming home for sale, there’s something for everyone here.

Ready to explore? Connect with one of our trusted local Realtors to find your ideal home in Beaver Dam and start experiencing what makes our community so special!

Contact A Realtor
Harbor Homes - New Construction
View Available Apartments
Monarch Lakeview Condos

Fun And Safe Learning Environment

If you’re searching for a community where your family can thrive and your children can receive a top-quality education, Beaver Dam is the perfect place to call home. The Beaver Dam Unified School District is dedicated to delivering exceptional learning experiences for all students, ensuring a strong educational foundation.

Families also have access to a variety of childcare options, private schools, and public schools, along with a local college campus to support lifelong learning. With so many educational opportunities available, Beaver Dam is an ideal community to raise and nurture your family.

Beaver Dam School District
Wayland Academy
St. Katherine Drexel School
Moraine Park Technical College
Community Care Preschool & Child Care
St. Stephen's Lutheran School
Kids Care
YMCA Child care

Quality Healthcare Close To Home

When you live in Beaver Dam, you can take comfort in knowing that you have convenient access to quality health and wellness services. From primary care to specialty care, the area offers a variety of health and wellness services. Beaver Dam is home to several hospitals, clinics, and other healthcare facilities that are known for providing excellent care to their residents. 

Marshfield Medical Center
Prairie Ridge Health
SSM Health Dean Medical Center
